title: GSM PORTAL TEKNOLOJİ HİZMETLERİ TİC. LTD. ŞTİ ransomware incident

victim.name: GSM PORTAL TEKNOLOJİ HİZMETLERİ TİC. LTD. ŞTİ

extortion.description: This is a small to medium-sized Turkish company officially registered in Istanbul, operating in the GSM telecommunications technology and technical services sector. It has complete official documentation but is not very active digitally
